description_long: This is a small, open-fronted wooden kiosk with a rectangular base and a striped pink-and-white canopy roof. The front features a hand-painted sign reading 'Fruit for sale' with small fruit illustrations and prices. Three wooden crates are set on the counter, each filled with different colored items resembling fruit or produce. The structure is supported by four vertical posts at the corners, and the back is open for access by a vendor. The overall design is simple and inviting, suitable for use as a market stall or street vendor booth in an urban setting.
description: A compact wooden kiosk with a pink-and-white striped canopy, front signage, and three produce crates on the counter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain wooden panel and the open serving area with three crates visible behind the counter.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view from the left, highlighting the sloped striped canopy and the colored contents of the crates.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the 'Fruit for sale' sign, three crates with colored produce, and the striped canopy overhead.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view from the right, showing the arrangement of crates and the open back of the kiosk.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign on the front panel, hand-painted with 'Fruit for sale' and fruit illustrations.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped canopy roof with pink-and-white fabric stripes, slight overhang on all sides.
attribute_architectural_style: rustic market stall with playful, traditional influences
